raw_consumer_statement: I ordered a dress from XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX  which is an online retailer from XXXX. Their main communication is via whatsapp and this is the portal from which I paid for the item in the amount of XXXX dollars. They promised a certain ship date ( before event ) and I still have not received item nor will they accept cancellation considering now the event is long past. All the proof and communication were sent to citicards yet they have decided in favor of the company despite the fact that I do not even have the item nor even any proof that it is in transit. They merely approved the company side from random policy documents that XXXX 's tsent them that was not made clear to me. They have not sent me any updates on the situation. I have contacted citi numerous times without resolution. Based on reviews, this Pernias Popup has been violating consumer 's trut habitually.
